response.overview: Rathimanmadhan is a 1977 Indian Malayalam film, directed by J. Sasikumar and produced by M.A. Rahman and Naseema Kabeer. The film stars Prem Nazir, Jayabharathi, Jayan and Sukumari in lead roles. The film had musical score by M. S. Viswanathan. Watch the full movie, Rathimanmadhan online, only on Eros Now.
response.title: Rathi Manmathan
